title: nania scandens
intro: Nania scandens, commonly known as the "Dwarf Philippine Violet", is a perennial plant species in the Acanthaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, offering various health benefits. The therapeutic actions of Nania scandens include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and analgesic properties, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The bioactive constituents of Nania scandens include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
